entry.title: Proof-of-work based signet faucet
entry.summary: The recent update on the mining software introduces compatibility with stratumv1 ASIC miners, enabling them to operate efficiently on a specialized test network. Users interested in deploying their bitaxe-level hardware for mining can connect to the server at inquisition.bitcoin-signet.net using port 3333. To participate, miners should configure their system to use a signet address as the user identifier. An example of such an address is tb1qr6lmcexy6285f3a04j2a75d39qvcdek739g8cz, which also facilitates direct fund transfers back to the mining wallet. By connecting their mining rigs as described, participants can expect to solve blocks regularly and receive pooled payouts within a couple of days. This setup not only provides a practical demonstration of the mining process on the signet but also allows for the testing and optimization of mining strategies in a controlled environment.
